indication: Treatment of adults with previously treated anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved crizotinib for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adults with previously treated anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer, and whose ALK rearrangement has been demonstrated by an accurate and validate test method.

document.name: Crizotinib Monotherapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Crizotinib Monotherapy, 2025, version number 7, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6934/243_V7_Crizotinib_Monotherapy.pdf
